name: zinput_mouse_get_state_snapshot_ptr
description: zInput::Mouse_GetStateSnapshotPtr returns the global mouse state snapshot storage.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows `mov eax, 0x561c80; retn`, returning the global g_zInput_MouseStateSnapshot storage.
The native smoke validates zInput::Mouse_GetStateSnapshotPtr returns &g_zInput_MouseStateSnapshot and that Mouse_GetStateSnapshot copies the same state.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Mouse_GetStateSnapshotPtr@zInput@@YAPAUMouseStateSnapshot@1@XZ at 0x4703a0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches; 4 relocation bytes were masked, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes were trimmed, BN size is 6 bytes, and VC object symbol size is 16 bytes.
